violations.description: COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Reachin cooler (Salad Cooler) in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41?F was not functioning adequately. Temperatures on the top part were noted at 44?F and greater and the main part at 47?F and greater. Dial adjusted to meet required temperatures.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Pop gun nozzles oven mitts food scales eachin cooler and freezer interiors microwave interior and meat slicer noted not properly maintained.

PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung when not in use. | PREMISES (1 pts): Lockers or other suitable storage facilities noted not provided or not being used for the storage of personal belongings. Do not store personal items (coats purses etc) on ice bins or food/food equipment racks.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Reachin cooler door interior (metal plate missing exposing insulation in Supera Cooler) and reachin cooler door gaskets noted not in good repair.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Counters reachin cooler/freezer exteriors microwave exteriors reachin cooler/freezer door handles swing door between front and back and other equipment exteriors noted not clean.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls under and around in place equipment and ceiling around vents noted in need of cleaning.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in the food prep areas.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Reachin cooler and freezer interiors microwave interior and meat slicer noted not cleaned on a regular basis.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Counters reachin cooler/freezer exteriors microwave exteriors reachin cooler/freezer door handles and other equipment exteriors noted not clean.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Reachin cooler door interior (metal plate missing exposing insulation) and reachin cooler door gaskets noted not in good repair.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls under and around in place equipment and ceiling around vents noted in need of cleaning.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung when not in use.
